title: Make "Completion Date" a default column available without needing automation
excerpt: We would love to have a column that shows us the date a task was marked as “Done”. Currently there is a workaround for this that involves setting up an automation that would run every time a status is changed to “done” t…

posts.author: cbrunskill (Catherine Brunskill)
posts.cookedHtml:
We would love to have a column that shows us the date a task was marked as “Done”. Currently there is a workaround for this that involves setting up an automation that would run every time a status is changed to “done” to populate the date in a new column: Tracking which tasks were completed on each day

The trouble with this is that it doesn’t help all of us below the Pro subscription level, because it would blow through all our monthly automation caps in about 2 seconds.

Can a new “Completion Date” column be added as a default column available in the platform? Seems doable since the date of the status changed is already being recorded under Activity, so it would just be a matter of setting up a column that could pull from the Activity record for each item/task.
